headline: Strong Memory Demand Amid Improving Pricing Drives BofA’s Bullish Rating on Western Digital (WDC)
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) secures a spot on our list of the best memory stocks to buy according to analysts. As of April 20, 2026, analyst sentiment on Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) remains strong, with 79% of covering analysts maintaining “Buy” ratings. The street-high price target of $440 implies about 18% upside from the current […]

headline: Why The Western Digital (WDC) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Targets And Expectations
summary: Western Digital’s updated fair value estimate has moved from US$321.00 to US$371.70, putting a sharper spotlight on where analysts think the stock could reasonably trade. That shift sits alongside a series of aggressive target hikes across the Street, with some firms calling out both upside potential and the risk that expectations may already be demanding. In the sections ahead, you will see how to make sense of this evolving narrative and what to watch as new research keeps coming in. Stay...
